description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a landscaped property featuring a main building with multiple rooflines, a swimming pool, and a detached covered structure, likely a garage or pool house. The house is surrounded by lush greenery, including mature trees, manicured lawns, and decorative shrubs, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The main building has a combination of flat and gable roofs, with large windows and multiple entry points, suggesting a spacious and open interior layout. Outdoor amenities include a swimming pool with a deck, a shaded patio area, and a driveway leading to the covered parking structure. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, enhancing security and separation from the surrounding environment. The overall design emphasizes modern luxury, outdoor living, and integration with landscaped elements.
description: A large, modern house with multiple rooflines, expansive windows, landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and a detached covered structure, all enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, lush landscaping, and the covered parking structure to the right.
description_view_1: View from the pool side, highlighting the swimming pool, patio, and rear facade with large windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the covered parking structure, pool area, and extensive garden with mature trees.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the garden area, outdoor seating, and the back of the house with visible landscaping and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent door, steps, a small porch, and is flanked by landscaping and a driveway.
